explanation: The user's instruction is to 'clean it in the sink', referring to the object currently being held, which is pot_1. To clean it, the robot must first place the pot in the sinkbasin to allow cleaning. It then needs to turn on the faucet, pour the contents of the pot into the sink, turn off the faucet, and finally return the pot to the countertop. The plan follows the logical sequence of actions required to clean the pot in the sink while respecting the robot's physical constraints (e.g., holding one object at a time, placing objects only when holding them).
